Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Intervene And To File Complaint-In-Intervention; Declaration Of Counsel In Support Thereof; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; [Proposed] Order Re: Complaint-In-Intervention
Off Calendar Mar-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

[PROPOSED] INTERVENORS FRANK CAVAZ and JULIE CAVAZ's Motion For Leave To Intervene And To File Complaint-In-Intervention is granted. No opposition filed.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing.
